column2: Infantry Training Scenario. As Americans moved into Germany in 1945, they encountered small pockets of fanatics intent on destroying infrastructure. The 101st rushes a bridge before it can be blown up. Only Squads, a Decoy, and an MG Weapon Team are used.
The American player wins if at game end he controls the bridge hex (5E5) AND is the sole occupant of building hex 5B5.
Turn 1: All Allied units enter the West edge of the map.
At start: in any hex East of the canal.

The German player may secretly exchange his MG WT for a second Decoy. If he does so, the game length becomes THREE turns (the American player will not be aware of this until the second Decoy is revealed).
